examples: The Chablis vineyard is the northernmost in Burgundy.
Beaune, Chablis, Auxerre and Macon are here.
At WineBid.com, the auction site where I found the Chablis, most wines are offered individually.
Try an ice-cold platter of the rare, tight-shelled Cranberry Island oysters, from off the Maine coast, with a decent Chablis.
